name: Obaa-chan's Cross
description: A small wooden cross carved from camphor wood — from a beam of the old Nagasaki church. It grows warm near hidden Christian artifacts.

name: Blade of the Pilgrim
description: A simple, unadorned blade given by The Messenger. Its story is not yet written.

name: Breviary Page
description: A damp page from Father Tomas's breviary. Written in Portuguese: 'God of my fathers, I am leaving these people without a shepherd. Send them another. Send them a saint.'

name: Miko's Flower
description: A small purple wildflower with a bent stem, given by a shy little girl. It seems like nothing. Keep it anyway.

name: Rice Cake
description: Simple pressed rice. Restores a small amount of strength.

name: Herbal Poultice
description: Medicinal herbs from Obaa-chan's garden, bound in a cloth. Eases pain.

name: Holy Water
description: A small vial of blessed water from Father Tomas. Purifies and restores spirit.
